properties.sql: SELECT id, c_application_id AS application_id, COALESCE(c_applicant_nid, '—') AS applicant_nid, COALESCE(c_programme_code, '—') AS programme_code, c_submitted_at AS submitted_at, COALESCE(c_attempt_count, '0') AS attempt_count, COALESCE(c_next_attempt_at, '') AS next_attempt_at, COALESCE(LEFT(c_last_error, 120), '') AS last_error, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - NULLIF(c_submitted_at, '')::timestamp)) / 60.0, 1) AS lag_minutes, CASE WHEN c_stage = 'eligibility_pending' AND COALESCE(c_attempt_count, '0')::int = 0 THEN 'pending' WHEN c_stage = 'eligibility_pending' AND COALESCE(c_attempt_count, '0')::int > 0 THEN 'retrying' WHEN c_stage = 'eligibility_done' THEN 'budget' WHEN c_stage = 'budget_done' THEN 'done' ELSE c_stage END AS stage_html FROM app_fd_processing_queue WHERE c_stage <> 'budget_done' OR c_stage IS NULL ORDER BY c_submitted_at ASC NULLS LAST
properties.countSql: SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_processing_queue WHERE c_stage <> 'budget_done' OR c_stage IS NULL
